title: [lichen_l2.c:1475-1480] Double-init check sets flag before error
description:
What: lichen_l2_iface_init() checks if lichen_iface is already set (line 1475), and if so, sets iface_init_failed (line 1477) and returns. This means if init is somehow called twice, both invocations fail.

Why it matters: This is intentional fail-safe behavior, not a bug. The comment explicitly states 'init requires reboot after failure'. The design ensures that partial initialization cannot be retried without a clean reboot.

Closing this as not-a-bug - this is correct defensive programming.
close_reason: Not a bug - intentional fail-safe design documented in comment at line 1476.
